# AI API Status Dashboard — Real-time Model Availability Monitor

> Real-time availability monitoring for 572+ AI models across 16+ providers. Tracks uptime, latency, and connectivity for Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, and Chinese LLMs from mainland China. Updated every 5 minutes.

## Core

- [README — Full dashboard overview](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/api-status/blob/main/README.md): Real-time API status monitoring for 572+ AI models spanning 16+ providers. 5-minute polling interval, 99.2% global connectivity rate, sub-300ms average latency from mainland China nodes. Tracks Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI (GPT), Google (Gemini), DeepSeek, xAI (Grok), Alibaba (Qwen), ByteDance (Doubao), Zhipu (GLM) and more.
- [Live Status Dashboard](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/): Interactive real-time dashboard showing model availability, latency heatmaps, and historical uptime for all 572+ models.
- [Model List & Pricing](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/models): Complete catalog of all 572+ models with provider, category, and availability status — text, image, video, multimodal, embedding, and rerank models.
- [API API Proxy China Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): Comprehensive guide for Chinese developers accessing overseas AI APIs through relay services. Covers setup, tool integration, and cost optimization.
- [2026 Price Crash Analysis](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/price-crash-2026.md): Analysis of the 2026 AI API price war — DeepSeek V4, GPT-5.5, Claude Sonnet 5, and cross-provider cost comparison.

## Supported Providers

- **Anthropic**: Claude Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, Sonnet 4.6, Claude Code — 20 models
- **OpenAI**: GPT-5.5 Pro, GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4 Mini, GPT Image 2, o4 series — 100 models
- **Google**: Gemini 3.1 Flash, Gemini 3, Gemini 2.5 Pro — 55 models
- **DeepSeek**: V4 Pro, V4 Flash, R1 — 28 models
- **xAI / SpaceXAI**: Grok 4.5 🆕, Grok 4.20 Reasoning, Grok Videos — 26 models
- **Alibaba (Qwen)**: Qwen 3.6 series — 90 models
- **ByteDance**: Doubao Seed 2.0 — 21 models
- **Zhipu GLM**: GLM-5, GLM-5 Flash, GLM-5.2 series — 17+ models

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): Recommended relay for mainland China. 572+ models across 16+ providers, OpenAI-compatible API, Alipay/WeChat payment, Hong Kong/Singapore edge nodes. Supports Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Cherry Studio, Dify, OpenWebUI, n8n integration.
